message:
feat(nn): add Module state_dict save/load with strict mode

Implement PyTorch-compatible state dictionary save/load for the Module
trait, supporting both parameters and persistent buffers (e.g. BatchNorm
running statistics).

crates/ft-nn/src/lib.rs:
- StateDict = BTreeMap<String, DenseTensor> for deterministic key order
- LoadStateDictReport { missing_keys, unexpected_keys } mirrors PyTorch
- StateDictError enum: Autograd, DenseTensor, DuplicateStateKey,
  UnsupportedDType, StrictKeyMismatch, ShapeMismatch, DTypeMismatch
- collect_state_targets: gathers named parameters + named persistent
  buffers, validates no duplicate keys
- snapshot_tensor_for_state_dict: reads tensor values, handles f64/f32
  dtypes, rejects others with UnsupportedDType
- module_state_dict: full snapshot into BTreeMap
- module_load_state_dict: validates all matching entries for shape/dtype
  before applying any writes (all-or-nothing); strict mode returns
  StrictKeyMismatch without partial application; non-strict reports
  missing/unexpected keys and applies matching entries
- Default trait implementations: state_dict() and load_state_dict()

Tests:
- state_dict_linear_contains_weight_and_bias: Linear(3,2) with bias
- state_dict_includes_persistent_buffers: BatchNorm1d produces all 5 keys
- load_state_dict_restores_parameters: sentinel fill -> restore -> verify
- load_state_dict_strict_rejects_missing_and_unexpected_keys
- load_state_dict_non_strict_reports_keys_and_applies_matches
- load_state_dict_rejects_shape_mismatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
